summary: Category Navigator cleanup verification - PASSED. Verified deprecated keys removed, new keys added, cleanup reports exist, and category tree API works correctly.

issues: No category navigators visible - no published layouts for DE country. This is expected as layouts haven't been published yet after cleanup.

action_items: Layouts need to be published for each country to make category navigators visible on public pages
critical_code_review_comments: Console hydration warnings on AdminContentBuilder: <span> as child of <option>, <select>, <tbody>, <tr> - should be fixed to improve React SSR/hydration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Category navigator cleanup verified. Backend API returns only 2 new keys (layout.category-navigator-main-side, layout.category-navigator-category-side). All deprecated keys removed. Frontend ExtendedRuntimeBlocks.jsx has the new components registered. Cleanup data reports exist. No published layouts exist for any country currently.
